title: Eldritch Mobs Modifications
description: Modifies Eldritch Mobs' elite, ultra, and eldritch loot tables and adds compatibility for a ton of modded mobs.
body:
![Revenant from The Graveyard mod with the Eldritch rarity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32dc44f6ca55503e8adabec1f078f460fbec0188.png)

Eldritch Mob Modifications is a data pack designed to diversify the Eldritch Mobs mod. This pack (currently) has two main features:

1. **Overhauled Loot Drops.** I have modified and made additions to all loot drops of each enemy tier, to hopefully encourage fighting the mobs without gaining a huge boost for defeating them.

2. **Modded Mob Support.** Compatibility has been added for a multitude of mods to allow thier mobs to spawn with the elite, ultra, or eldritch mob attributes.
The mods I have added support for are:
- Artifacts
- Friends & Foes
- Dunes & Drought
- Jaiz Mobs
- Deeper and Darker
- Earth2Java
- Enderman Overhaul
- Ender Zoology
- Fryc Mob Variants
- The Graveyard
- Illager Invasion
- Elemental Creepers: Refabricated
- Dungeon Now Loading
- Galosphere
- Creeper Overhaul
- Minecells
- Majrusz's Progressive Difficulty
- Naturalist

I plan on adding more support in the future.

My current plans for this mod is to continue adding modded mob support and refine the loot table, and eventually learn how to create new modifiers, buffs, and attacks for the elite, ultra, and eldritch mobs. 
**If you have any issues or suggestions, contact me on Discord! (@lostdoge08)**
